prompt:
Use case: social ad opener
Primary request: Show operational noise as an overwhelming but abstract system overload for an investor-style brand ad. Premium Swiss brutalist precision, no people, no logos.
Scene/background: black background with burnt orange alert lines, off-white fragments of charts, document blocks, feed cards, and flashing grid marks colliding in space
Subject: noise, activity, overload
Action: beat 1 (0-1.5s) fragments slam into frame from different angles; beat 2 (1.5-3s) the composition becomes chaotic but stays readable; beat 3 (3-4s) everything freezes under a bold headline
Camera: fast editorial push-in ending in a locked-off frame
Lighting/mood: urgent, sharp, high-contrast
Color palette: black, off-white, burnt orange
Style/format: premium brutalist motion-graphics ad
Audio: sharp impacts, rising pulse, no dialogue
Text (verbatim): "MORE ACTIVITY. MORE NOISE."
Constraints: no logos; no people; text must be centered and legible
Avoid: glitch spam, cheesy warning icons, unreadable microtext
